positive: A clean, stylized graphic illustration of a cosmic wildlife scene. The main subject is a bioluminescent fox standing on a crescent moon, surrounded by swirling nebulae and geometric constellations. The fox should have a minimalist, elegant silhouette with deep sapphire and ethereal cyan accents, set against a striking contrast of deep indigo and velvet black space. Incorporate abstract celestial elements, such as stylized planetary rings and glowing comet trails, integrated into the background. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical for maximum apparel impact. Vector illustration style, negative space utilized creatively, strong linework, high contrast, suitable for printing on fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, low quality, messy lines, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, solid color background, photo, realistic, photorealism
